intelligence.hypothesis: Telemetry stable; no immediate stress signal.

registry_comparison.P2: Matches registry (Mexican Mint, Black Pot, Soil, Sensor)
registry_comparison.Unmonitored: Matches registry (Money Plant, White Cup, Water Propagation, No Sensors)

earliest.description: Small plant with 4-5 turgid, roundish, green leaves. Appears healthy. Sensors visible.

t-3.description: Similar to earliest. 4-5 turgid, green leaves. Sensors visible.
t-3.changes_from_previous: No significant visual change in the plant itself.

t-2.description: Leaves appear slightly less turgid, a subtle droop in lower leaves. Color remains green. 4-5 leaves still present. Sensors visible.

t-1.description: Plant is largely indiscernible due to extreme darkness. Appears to have collapsed, been removed, or is completely obscured. Sensors are faintly visible.
t-1.changes_from_previous: Dramatic loss of visibility due to severe underexposure; plant appears absent or collapsed.

current.description: Completely indiscernible due to extreme darkness. No plant, soil, or sensors are visible.
current.changes_from_previous: Complete loss of visual information; plant remains indiscernible.

earliest.description: Single stem with one prominent, turgid, green leaf in a white cup with water. Appears healthy.

t-3.description: Similar to earliest. Single turgid, green leaf. Water level appears slightly lower.
t-3.changes_from_previous: No significant visual change in the plant itself; water level slightly lower.

t-2.description: Similar to T-3. Single turgid, green leaf. Water level appears consistent with T-3.
t-2.changes_from_previous: No significant visual change in the plant or water level.

t-1.description: Plant is largely indiscernible due to extreme darkness. Faint outline of the cup and water surface visible.
t-1.changes_from_previous: Dramatic loss of visibility due to severe underexposure; plant is obscured.

current.description: Completely indiscernible due to extreme darkness. No plant, water, or cup details are visible.
current.changes_from_previous: Complete loss of visual information; plant remains indiscernible.

soil_p2.t-2: Appears drier on surface, no cracking.

biome_anomalies.description: Severe underexposure/darkness in images [T-1] and [CURRENT], rendering the entire scene largely invisible. This is a critical environmental change impacting observation.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-3: Minimal changes; slight water level drop in the white cup.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_t-2: P2 plant shows subtle signs of reduced turgidity; soil in P2 appears drier.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Dramatic reduction in ambient light/exposure, leading to near-total obscurity of both plants. P2 plant appears to have collapsed or been removed.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Further reduction in light/exposure, resulting in complete visual obscurity of both plants and containers.

visual_health_inference.P2_Mexican_Mint_overall: Initially healthy, showing mild stress (reduced turgidity) by [T-2]. Subsequently visually lost/collapsed/removed/obscured in [T-1] and [CURRENT] due to extreme darkness. Its final health status is undeterminable based on visual evidence.
visual_health_inference.Unmonitored_Money_Plant_overall: Consistently healthy and turgid in visible images ([EARLIEST] to [T-2]). Subsequently visually lost/obscured in [T-1] and [CURRENT] due to extreme darkness. Its final health status is undeterminable based on visual evidence.

anomalies.description: Extreme and progressive underexposure/darkness in images [T-1] and [CURRENT], making visual assessment impossible.
The apparent collapse or disappearance of the P2 (Mexican Mint) plant in image [T-1], even accounting for the darkness, suggests a significant event beyond simple obscurity.

vision_report.narrative_description: The observational sequence begins with a healthy Mexican Mint (P2) in a black pot with sensors and a healthy Money Plant cutting in a white cup with water. Over the first few days, the Mexican Mint shows subtle signs of reduced turgidity, and its soil appears to dry out, indicating mild stress. The Money Plant cutting remains stable and healthy. However, a critical environmental anomaly occurs in the latter part of the sequence: the last two images ([T-1] and [CURRENT]) suffer from severe and progressive underexposure, plunging the scene into near-total darkness. This renders both plants and their containers largely, then completely, indiscernible. From a visual perspective, the Mexican Mint appears to have either collapsed or been removed by image [T-1], representing a 'Systemic Loss' of visual information. The Money Plant is also entirely obscured. The extreme darkness prevents a definitive final health assessment for either specimen, making their current status visually undeterminable.
vision_report.confidence: High for observations in [EARLIEST] to [T-2] due to clear visibility. Low for [T-1] and [CURRENT] due to extreme darkness and lack of visual data, leading to undeterminable plant status.
